$description: Copy this template for each agent's runtime checkpoint. Stored at data/status/{deal-id}/agents/{agent-name}.json
resumePointDescription: A string describing where to resume if interrupted mid-task. E.g., 'Completed units 1-50, resume at unit 51'

inputs.$description: Structured data received from upstream agents or orchestrator

outputs.$description: Structured data produced by this agent for downstream consumers

dataForDownstream.$description: Specific structured data that dependent agents need. Keys should match what downstream agents expect.

dataGapFormat: Array of strings describing data that could not be obtained
errorFormat: Array of { message: string, timestamp: string, recoverable: boolean }
redFlagFormat: Array of { description: string, severity: 'HIGH'|'MEDIUM'|'LOW', category: string }
childAgentFormat: Array of { agentName: string, status: string, taskId: string }
